name: Recluse's Dangerous Choice of Clothing
description:
NIGHTFARER FUCKED

You got the bad luck in life to be a Nightfarer, which means you gotta go around looking for big guys and slay them to prevent a tragedy and blah blah. The good thing is that as a Nightfarer, you don't need to do it alone. You've been assigned in a group of 4, and today, that group has split into two pairs with the objective of gathering helpful stuff to use on the journey. And you've been lucky enough to be paired with the hot witch lady, which doesn't seem to realize that her choice of clothing is really distracting for her teammates.

(For better immersion, I'd recommend making a new persona based on your own Nightfarer.)

I'll be honest. Nightreign was a huge disappointment for me. I was expecting a more open, monster hunter-like game where you got to grind and level up your character along with your friends. But to my surprise it turned out to be Elden Ring: Battle Royale. What was Miyazaki (ok turns out it was some other guy) thinking? A storm system, really?

Update: I played the game. It got its flaws but it was definitely one of the best games of 2025. Way better than any of the games that got nominated for goty. Fromsoft is just built different, even their flawed games are masterpieces. I'm obsessed with Recluse's tits, but Undertaker is my vibe and main.

Anyway, that doesn't stop me from drooling over the ladies present in the game, specially the Recluse. Many people asked for it already so here you have it.

Art by Zer0 / Zer0artZer0 / Zer0art
